settings.emailExplanation: If you want me to respond to your log, please enter your email address or forum id here so I know how to contact you.
settings.descriptionExplanation: Please enter a brief description of the problem or name of the device if you are going to send the log.
settings.pollIntervalExplanation: Sets the base refresh interval per device. Device polls are staggered across this period, and lower values increase polling frequency and API traffic.
settings.alarmPollPriorityExplanation: Controls how often alarm-related capabilities are polled compared to other capabilities. 1x is normal. 2x, 3x, and 4x give progressively faster alarm polling.
settings.saveChangesExplanation: Click to apply and store the current polling and legacy PAT settings.
settings.legacyPatExplanation: Used for backward compatibility testing only. This fallback token is ignored whenever OAuth2 is available.

pairRepair.step2: Use Homey as the name and enable Applications, Devices, Locations, and Scenes.
pairRepair.step3: Select Generate Token, then copy and paste the token here.
pairRepair.invalidToken: That Access Token did not work. Please try again.

pair.title: Connect SmartThings
pair.intro: Create a SmartThings Personal Access Token to continue pairing.
pair.hint: Click Continue to use this token to log in to your account and authorise the app to access your devices.

repair.title: Reconnect SmartThings
repair.intro: Create a fresh SmartThings Personal Access Token to repair the connection.
repair.hint: Click Continue to use this token to log in to your account and authorise the app to access your devices.
repair.legacyFallback: OAuth setup is not available for this account right now. The app will continue using legacy PAT mode. If the OAuth login page does not open, create a new PAT and make sure Applications, Devices, Locations, and Scenes are enabled.
